title: Regulation of a conserved cellular pathway
text: Cells regulate biochemical pathways through interacting proteins, metabolites, and feedback mechanisms. This educational excerpt describes how enzyme activity can be altered by substrate availability, allosteric regulation, covalent modification, compartmentalization, and changes in gene expression. The material is presented as a general biological explanation rather than clinical advice. It defines the relevant terminology, distinguishes direct experimental observations from proposed mechanisms, and identifies the source article and its Creative Commons licence. The excerpt contains coherent prose and enough context to determine whether it belongs in a biology retrieval corpus.

curation.reason: The material is coherent, scientifically accurate regarding general biological mechanisms (allosteric regulation, covalent modification), explicitly avoids clinical advice, and contains sufficient context for inclusion in a biology corpus.
